name: CodeWalker
description: Swiss Army knife for devs: token waste detector, security flagging, live repo viewer, game plan tracker. Runs as a sidebar agent.
author: CodeWalker

subagents.name: Token Saver
subagents.description: Scans context for junk — unused vars, bloated imports, stale indexes. Shows waste in sidebar graph.

subagents.name: Security Flagger
subagents.description: Real-time vuln highlighter: secrets, injections, deps. Red/yellow/green heatmap on code.

subagents.name: Repo Viewer
subagents.description: Live repo map — click to jump, see Cursor build history, trace token hogs.

skills.name: tokenAudit
skills.description: Runs lightweight AST parse — flags 200+ token leaks per file.

skills.name: vulnScan
skills.description: Checks for OWASP top 10 + secrets. Returns severity + fix.

skills.name: repoTrace
skills.description: Builds git tree + Cursor session log. Links code to past runs.

skills.name: updateGamePlan
skills.description: Auto-updates goal progress from Cursor agent output.

skills.name: parseSuggestedGoals
skills.description: Extracts suggested goals from agent response and merges into plan.

commands.name: suggest-goals
commands.description: Generate 3-5 smart next goals from current repo and plan.
